outages.boundary: East Quail Run Dr to East Kino Rd and East Fremont Dr to South Rolling Ridge Dr
outages.comments: An issue affecting electrical equipment in the area has resulted in a power outage. Our crews are actively working to restore service  and we appreciate your patience as we complete repairs safely.

outages.boundary: Beherend Dr to Piute Ave and 59th Ave
outages.comments: Our crews are working to restore the outage caused by a damaged transformer.

outages.boundary: Silver Creek Dr. to Red Fox Ln. and Rain Bow Trout Dr. to KB Ranch Rd.
outages.comments: Severe weather in the area has damaged equipment. We are working to restore power as quickly and safely as possible.
